title: Unexpected Execution Result
description:
### What happens?

Dear DuckDB Developers,
I have encountered an unexpected execution result and have prepared a reproducible case, which I’ve included below. I would greatly appreciate it if you could take a moment to review it.

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);

INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (-1), (1), (1);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 GROUP BY (t0.c0);

SELECT v0.c0 FROM v0 LEFT JOIN t0 ON (((v0.c0))<(t0.c0));
-- Wrong Execution Result:
-- -1
-- 1

-- Expected Result:
-- -1
-- -1
-- 1

```


### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);

INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES (-1), (1), (1);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 GROUP BY (t0.c0);

SELECT v0.c0 FROM v0 LEFT JOIN t0 ON (((v0.c0))<(t0.c0));
-- Wrong Execution Result:
-- -1
-- 1

-- Expected Result:
-- -1
-- -1
-- 1
```

### OS:

MacOS

### DuckDB Version:

DuckDB v1.5.0-dev3591 (Development Version, 06f5a6dd69)

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE c1 > 0;
SELECT v1.c1 FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON v1.c1 < t1.c1;
SELECT v1.c1, COUNT(t1.c2) FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON v1.c1 < t1.c1 GROUP BY v1.c1;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with less than condition on grouped view
